alkylation concentration: 20 μl IAA (200 mM) in dark for 30 min
cleavage agent: the recombinant HKU1 S1 was digested by trypsin, chymotrypsin...
collision energy: the stepped collision energy for HCD 20–30%, was set for sufficient fragmentation
enrichment method: the enrichment method for O-glycopeptides with HBS was developed
fragmentation method: we only used HCD to fragment the O-linked glycopeptides
instrument: the enriched bovine fetuin and HKU1 S1 O-glycopeptides were separated and characterized using Q-Exactive Orbitrap
ionization type: analyzed on a nano-ESI-Q-TOF mass spectrometer
labeling: the recovery was measured by using the stable-isotope dimethyl labeling method
reduction reagent: 20 μl DTT (200 mM) was added for reduction
reduction concentration: 20 μl DTT (200 mM) was added for reduction
